\tzpentry{ID3865}{Phase Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3865 introduces Phase Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\\\\dot\\\\varphi\_i \= \\\\omega\_i \+ \\\\frac{1}{N}\\\\sum\_j K\_{ij}\\\\sin(\\\\varphi\_j-\\\\varphi\_i) \+ \\\\eta\_i(t).$$
